headline: Walmart Deepens Healthcare Reach With Medicare Support Push
summary: Walmart's Medicare support push may deepen pharmacy engagement, boost loyalty and strengthen its healthcare presence across chronic care.

headline: Matthew McClintock: Prime Day is approaching what we see with Black Friday
summary: Matthew McClintock, Founder of M Squared Capital, expects a strong Prime Day as inflation pressures drive consumers toward deals. He favors Walmart operationally but sees Target as the more attractive stock.
